title: Variable types should match their type annotations
description: Enforces that variables are assigned values of the types specified in their type annotations.
message: Variable type mismatch with its type annotation
recommendation: Use type hints consistently and enforce them

noncompliant.description: Variable x is assigned a string value instead of an integer as declared

compliant.description: Variable x is assigned an integer value as declared

why_is_this_an_issue: Inconsistent type usage can lead to runtime errors and make code harder to understand and maintain
how_to_fix: Ensure variables are assigned values of the types specified in their type annotations
